title: CAS-ELMS Geofencing Attendance Bug Fixes
summary: Production debugging and fixes for 3 critical bugs in the CAS-ELMS Flutter geofencing attendance app: (1) attendance not marked despite time tracking working, (2) impossible 26+ hour tracked durations, (3) force-kill/swipe-away not performing exit cleanup. Root causes identified and fixed across 5 files with a 4-layer defense-in-depth strategy.
